description: AI-powered earnings call analysis with transcript processing, metric extraction, and sentiment analysis for investment intelligence

agents.name: Transcript Processor
agents.description: Ingests and parses raw earnings call transcripts, identifying speaker segments, Q&A sections, and forward-looking statements for downstream analysis

agents.name: Metric Extractor
agents.description: Extracts key financial metrics, KPIs, guidance figures, and period-over-period changes from processed transcript data

agents.name: Sentiment Analyst
agents.description: Analyzes management tone, market outlook sentiment, and forward guidance confidence to generate bullish/bearish/neutral ratings
